valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.assumption_summary: After-tax product cash flow net of erosion, rebates, sustaining commercial cost, and patent loss.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

assumptions.label: After-tax owner margin on MS portfolio
assumptions.rationale: Patent cliff on TECFIDERA/TYSABRI; European revocation and method patent expiry.

assumptions.label: After-tax owner margin on biosimilars
assumptions.rationale: Competitive biosimilar pressure on margins.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted multiple on MS owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Shorter effective life vs rare disease; erosion-weighted annuity.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted multiple on biosimilar owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Generic-like competitive dynamics.

assumptions.label: Portfolio-level schedule calibration
assumptions.rationale: Reconciles product-level schedules to bounded legacy component range.

valuation.assumption_summary: Risked product cash flows with explicit penetration, duration, pricing, and commercial reinvestment.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

assumptions.label: After-tax owner margin on growth portfolio
assumptions.rationale: SKYCLARYS, QALSODY, SPINRAZA, LEQEMBI share; rebate and launch reinvestment.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash multiple
assumptions.rationale: Growth portfolio +19% YoY per proxy; longer duration than legacy MS.

assumptions.label: Portfolio-level schedule calibration
assumptions.rationale: Reconciles rare-disease schedule to bounded legacy component range.

valuation.assumption_summary: Each indication must have non-overlapping technical/regulatory probabilities, timing, remaining R&D, launch cost, and failure value.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted litifilimab value
assumptions.rationale: Phase 3 SLE readout H2 2026; reference-class Phase 3 success probability.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted felzartamab nephrology bundle
assumptions.rationale: Three registrational Phase 3 studies (AMR, IgAN, PMN) per proxy.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted dapirolizumab value
assumptions.rationale: Ongoing Phase 3 lupus program; non-overlapping with litifilimab.

assumptions.label: Other Phase 2/3 risked value
assumptions.rationale: SKYCLARYS pediatric, high-dose nusinersen, BIIB080, salanersen INDs.

assumptions.label: Remaining R&D and launch capital
assumptions.rationale: Deducts disclosed Phase 3 spend and launch prep not in marketed-product DCFs.

assumptions.label: Tree-level calibration to bounded component range
assumptions.rationale: Preserves non-overlapping branch structure while matching legacy low/base/high.

valuation.assumption_summary: Value acquired assets independently of purchase price, then deduct all acquisition financing and contingent consideration.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: Item 2.01; acquired products generated $689M in 2025 revenue

assumptions.label: Probability-weighted commercial success
assumptions.rationale: SYFOVRE/EMPAVELI anchored to disclosed sales; geographic expansion risk.

assumptions.label: Revenue-to-value multiple on commercial base
assumptions.rationale: Transaction-anchored cross-check; not proof of $5.3B headline price.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted CVR milestone upside
assumptions.rationale: 8-K CVR: up to $582M if SYFOVRE sales hit $1.5B/$2.0B thresholds.

assumptions.label: Tree-level calibration to bounded component range
assumptions.rationale: Preserves commercial/CVR branch separation while matching legacy range.

components.label: Net debt, acquisition financing, and CVRs

valuation.assumption_summary: Deduct existing net debt, acquisition borrowings, contingent payments, and required liquidity without double counting transaction cost.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

inputs.label: New term facilities drawn at close

source.locator: Credit Agreement; $2.0B term facilities fully drawn

assumptions.label: Expected CVR liability
assumptions.rationale: 8-K estimates ~$582M maximum if all SYFOVRE milestones hit.

assumptions.label: Integration and transaction costs
assumptions.rationale: Bounded from disclosed deal fees; PPA refines in first post-close 10-Q.

assumptions.label: Deleveraging and integration stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Low case adds stress not captured in base post-close net-debt path.

assumptions.label: Pro-forma close calibration
assumptions.rationale: Reconciles Q1 pre-close balance sheet plus 8-K close mechanics to bounded range.

valuation.assumption_summary: Explicit reserve for correlated downside not captured by independent product and pipeline ranges.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

assumptions.label: Correlated patent, clinical, and integration reserve
assumptions.rationale: MS patent cliffs, Phase 3 failure correlation, Apellis integration drag.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of BIIB, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Biogen FY2025 results and 2025 Form 10-K: $9.891bn revenue, $2.1bn free cash flow, $4.2bn cash, $6.3bn debt, and approximately 147m diluted shares; Apellis transaction terms disclosed in 2026.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Biogen FY2025 results and 2025 Form 10-K: $9.891bn revenue, $2.1bn free cash flow, $4.2bn cash, $6.3bn debt, and approximately 147m diluted shares; Apellis transaction terms disclosed in 2026.

component_groups.label: Legacy marketed products
component_groups.valuation_basis: After-tax product cash flow net of erosion, rebates, sustaining commercial cost, and patent loss.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key legacy_products; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Growth marketed products
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risked product cash flows with explicit penetration, duration, pricing, and commercial reinvestment.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key growth_products; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Research pipeline
component_groups.valuation_basis: Each indication must have non-overlapping technical/regulatory probabilities, timing, remaining R&D, launch cost, and failure value.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key pipeline; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Apellis marketed and pipeline assets
component_groups.valuation_basis: Value acquired assets independently of purchase price, then deduct all acquisition financing and contingent consideration.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key apellis_assets; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Net debt, acquisition financing, and CVRs
component_groups.economic_claim: Net debt, acquisition financing, and CVRs
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduct existing net debt, acquisition borrowings, contingent payments, and required liquidity without double counting transaction cost.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_debt_acquisition_and_cvrs; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Patent, clinical-failure, and cash-burn reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Explicit reserve for correlated downside not captured by independent product and pipeline ranges.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key patent_failure_and_burn_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Greenblatt/Pabrai: use a finite, non-overlapping event tree.
Klarman: transaction price is an evidence anchor, not proof of value.
Marks/Oaktree: acquisition financing and cash burn precede equity optionality.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

biotech_overlay.notes: Context overlay only — does not replace Lawrence IRR.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Legacy marketed products
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets
failure_modes: pipeline value counted in both revenue forecast and option schedule
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: Binary and milestone-driven assets

method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder / croupier — Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
